title: 4 "Heavy Duty Wall Non Slip Soft Grip Scraper Tool - Effortless Removal of Wallpaper, Floor Tiles, and Stubborn Materials - Durable and Ergonomic Design"
features: Heavy-duty Construction: Crafted with durable materials, this scraper tool is built to withstand the rigors of tough scraping tasks, ensuring long-lasting performance.
Non-Slip Soft Grip Handle: The ergonomic design of the handle provides a comfortable and secure grip, reducing hand fatigue and enhancing control during use.

Versatile Application: From removing old paint and adhesives to smoothing out surfaces, this scraper tool is suitable for a wide range of surface preparation tasks, making it an essential tool for DIY projects and professional jobs alike.
Precision Performance: Engineered for precision scraping, this tool ensures efficient removal of debris and paint without damaging underlying surfaces, delivering consistently high-quality results.
Easy to Clean: Designed for hassle-free maintenance, this scraper tool is easy to clean after use, ensuring optimal performance for future projects.
description: Heavy Duty Wall Non Slip Soft Grip Scraper Tool, your ultimate solution for professional-grade removal of wallpaper and floor tiles. Designed with durability, efficiency, and user comfort in mind, this scraper tool is the perfect companion for tackling tough projects with ease Feature: 1. Heavy duty steel blade for efficient removal of wallpaper and floor tiles 2. Non-slip soft grip handle for comfortable and secure handling 3. Protective cap for safe storage and enhanced durability 4. Versatile tool suitable for various surfaces and materials 5. Perfect for homeowners, contractors, and DIY enthusiasts Specification: Material: Steel blade with a non-slip soft grip handle Handle Design: Ergonomic design for comfortable and secure handling Protective Cap: Included for safe storage and to protect the blade Versatility: Suitable for removing wallpaper, vinyl, linoleum, ceramic tiles, and more Application: Ideal for use on walls and floors Package Included: 4" Heavy Duty Wall Non Slip Soft Grip Scraper Tool
